error_description: JSON parsing failed on null values in partner response
attempted_solution: Tried json.loads after stripping whitespace; still crashed when 'details' field was null
solution: Add explicit null checks and default empty objects for optional fields before parsing; use dict.get with defaults
prevention_tip: Validate payloads against a JSON schema and treat optional fields as nullable

error_description: Upload requests timeout on files larger than 50MB
context: Web app file upload service (nginx -> app -> S3)
attempted_solution: Raised client timeout to 30s which helped for 20-30MB but not larger
solution: Enable streaming/chunked uploads end-to-end and increase server read_timeout to 120s; configure nginx proxy_read_timeout accordingly
prevention_tip: Use streaming by default and test with 100MB+ files in CI to catch regressions

error_description: Race condition caused duplicate invoices during concurrent checkout
context: Billing service — POST /invoices during checkout peak
attempted_solution: Added a naive retry around DB insert
prevention_tip: Introduce idempotency keys and a unique constraint on (customer_id, cart_id) to enforce single invoice

error_description: Production cron failed due to missing environment variable (PAYMENTS_API_KEY)
context: Nightly reconciliation job on worker container
attempted_solution: Re-deployed container with updated .env but cron still failed when launched by scheduler
solution: Load .env within the cron bootstrap and add a preflight check that exits if required envs are missing
prevention_tip: Add startup assertions for required env vars and monitor failures with alerting

error_description: External API returned 429 rate limit errors during burst traffic
attempted_solution: Added a simple 1-second sleep and retry on 429
solution: Implement exponential backoff with full jitter and respect Retry-After header; cache repeat queries for 5 minutes
prevention_tip: Use a token bucket per API key and add a circuit breaker when 429 rate increases
